mapper.select: select id, emp_id as empId, start_date as startDate, end_date as endDate, company, position, create_time as createTime, update_time as updateTime from emp_expr where emp_id = #{empId} order by start_date asc, id asc
mapper.insert:
insert into emp_expr(emp_id, start_date, end_date, company, position) values
(#{empId}, #{item.startDate}, #{item.endDate}, #{item.company}, #{item.position})
